title: Asset Hub
subtitle: One platform for every AI-generated asset
description: A central platform where AI generators and LLMs create, refine, and manage digital assets—including images, video, audio, 3D, and splats. Offered as an open-source app you can self-host, on cloud or on-premise.

title: Splat Designer
subtitle: Immersive Spatial Scenography (HFF München)
description: A high-fidelity Virtual Reality design suite leveraging 3D Gaussian Splatting to bridge physical prop libraries and virtual production stages.
